CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, str VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'a;b;c');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (2, 'x,y,z');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (3, 'hello|world|duckdb');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (4, 'singlepart');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (5, 'part1|part2|part3|part4');
SELECT split_part(str, ';', 1) AS part1 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT split_part(str, ';', 2) AS part2 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT split_part(str, ';', 3) AS part3 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT split_part(str, ';', 4) AS part4 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT split_part(str, ',', 1) AS part1 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT split_part(str, ',', 2) AS part2 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 1) AS part1 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 2) AS part2 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 3) AS part3 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 4) AS part4 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 5) AS part5 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 1) AS part1 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 2) AS part2 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 3) AS part3 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT split_part(str, '|', 1) AS part1, split_part(str, '|', 2) AS part2 FROM test_strings WHERE id = 5;
SELECT t1.id, split_part(t2.str, ';', 2) FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT CASE WHEN split_part(str, ';', 10) = '' THEN 'out of bounds' ELSE split_part(str, ';', 10) END AS result FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
